description: Admin HTML components, including Select and DatePicker, should default to ordinary medium size, not large, unless a component-specific contract explicitly overrides it.

default_value_arbitration.conflict_policy: When Storybook default stories or usage snippets set InputSize.LARGE but the API reference table declares medium, generated business/admin pages must use medium unless an explicit override is present.

checks.description: Runtime-backed components that emit size metadata should use medium by default.
Large size may be used only when a component spec explicitly requests it for a specific need.
API reference defaults win over Storybook example args when the user has not requested a size override.
